mapper.select: select count(*) from article_views where article_id = #{articleId}
select count(*) from article_favorites where article_id = #{articleId}
select count(*) from comments where article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.insert: insert into article_views (article_id, viewed_at) values (#{articleId}, datetime('now'))
mapper.select: select A.slug articleSlug, A.title articleTitle, A.description articleDescription, count(AF.user_id) favoriteCount, U.id userId, U.username userUsername, U.bio userBio, U.image userImage from article_favorites AF inner join articles A on A.id = AF.article_id inner join users U on U.id = A.user_id where AF.rowid in ( select rowid from article_favorites where article_id = AF.article_id ) and A.created_at >= datetime('now', '-' || #{days} || ' days') group by A.id order by favoriteCount desc limit #{limit}
